description_long: This rifle features a futuristic, sci-fi inspired design with a circular rear stock and a sleek, angular body. The main body is predominantly matte black with glowing cyan accents and highlights, giving it a high-tech appearance. The rifle has a large, circular rear section that appears to function as a stock or energy chamber, and a forward section with a barrel and integrated handguard. There is a visible trigger area and a detachable magazine located below the barrel. The surface is smooth with some grippy, textured areas for handling. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and advanced polymer materials, with a compact, ergonomic form factor.
description: A futuristic black rifle with glowing cyan accents, circular rear stock, and detachable magazine. Its sleek, angular design and smooth surfaces evoke advanced technology.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the rifle's narrow width and the circular rear stock.
description_view_1: Full side view highlighting the circular rear stock, angular body, and cyan accents.
description_view_2: Top-down view showing the slim profile and placement of the magazine below the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the circular stock and angular body details.
